violations.text: Refrigerator thermometer is broken and needs to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2024

The ceiling in what had been the basement storage area in the previous inspection is unfinished, with exposed spun insulation. NO FOOD OR SINGLE SERVICE ITEMS ARE TO BE STORED IN UNFINISHED AREA. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

Frozen brownie dough was observed out of its packaging, in contact with the unclean inside of the chest freezer. Food must be protected from contamination by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. Brownie dough was voluntarily disposed of by PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
Food observed stored on the floor in the kitchen and top of the basement stairs. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the basement storage area. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezers have an accumulation of frost and food debris. The ice cream freezer on front service line, the grease trap, and the small refrigerator have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The rolling rack for sheet pans has an accumulation of metal shards and other debris. ice cream freezer on front service line small refrigerator Rolling racks Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
The hand sink in the kitchen has an accumulation of soil residue and debris. Plumbing fixtures such as hand sinks must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

The stairs to the basement, and the ledge along the stairs have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
The ceiling in the basement storage areas is unfinished, with exposed spun insulation throughout the basement. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
